summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KEDA Dashboard application. Backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend UI mostly functional with professional design, but has authentication persistence and logout issues.

ui_bugs.issue: ScaledObjects not loading in frontend despite backend API working correctly
ui_bugs.details: Frontend shows 0 ScaledObjects but backend API returns 6 objects correctly. Likely authentication token persistence issue.

ui_bugs.issue: No logout functionality found in UI
ui_bugs.details: Logout button not visible in any location including admin menu, user dropdown, or sidebar.

ui_bugs.issue: Scaler type filter shows incorrect results
ui_bugs.details: When filtering by 'cron' scaler type, shows 6 results instead of expected 1.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend loses authentication state during session
integration_issues.details: Backend API works with manual token, but frontend shows empty data suggesting token not being sent properly.

passed_tests: Frontend login with valid credentials works
Frontend login with invalid credentials shows error
Frontend cron event creation dialog works
Frontend cron event editing dialog works
Frontend form fields and tabs work correctly
Frontend hover states reveal action buttons
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication persistence issue causing ScaledObjects not to load despite backend working correctly. Add logout functionality to UI. Investigate why frontend loses authentication token during session.
